Get In Touch

Request a Freight Quote

Need freight moved between Mayo and Whitehorse? Get in touch for a quote, pickup coordination, or to ask about upcoming weekend runs. We'll respond with clear next steps and realistic timing.

Send a Quote Request

Fill out the form and we'll get back to you with next steps.

We'll respond as soon as we can. No obligation.

Find Us

Mayo, Yukon — serving the Mayo–Whitehorse route

Interactive Map

Mayo, Yukon, Canada

40 Mile Supply

40 Mile Supply is a Mayo-based freight service offering dependable weekend runs between Mayo and Whitehorse for supplies, pickups, project freight, and practical local delivery support.

Services

  • Weekend Freight Runs
  • Whitehorse Pickups
  • Business Restock
  • Contractor & Project Freight
  • Custom Freight
